sentences.target: Je te venge au prochain match.

translations.fr: Je te venge au prochain match.
translations.en: I’ll avenge you in the next game.
translations.es: Te vengaré en el próximo partido.
translations.de: Ich werde dich im nächsten Spiel rächen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我会在下一场比赛替你报仇。
translations.yue: 我會喺下一場比賽幫你報仇。
translations.ru: Я отомщу за тебя в следующем матче.
translations.pt: Vou te vingar no próximo jogo.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ trả thù cho bạn trong trận tới.
translations.nl: Ik zal je in de volgende wedstrijd wreken.
translations.uk: Я помщуся за тебе в наступному матчі.
translations.hi: मैं अगले मैच में तुम्हारा बदला लूँगा.
translations.el: Θα σε εκδικηθώ στον επόμενο αγώνα.
translations.nb: Jeg skal hevne deg i neste kamp.
translations.id: Aku akan membalaskan dendammu di pertandingan berikutnya.
translations.sv: Jag ska hämnas för dig i nästa match.
translations.ro: Te voi răzbuna în următorul meci.
translations.da: Jeg vil hævne dig i næste kamp.
translations.ja: 次の試合で君の仇を討つ。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject clitic pronoun; grammatical subject of the finite verb 'venge'.
2nd-person singular clitic object pronoun; here the direct object of 'venge' (venger quelqu’un).
Finite verb, present indicative 1sg; transitive predicate selecting a direct object ('te') and allowing a locative/temporal PP.
Contraction of preposition 'à' and definite article 'le'; introduces the PP headed by 'match' (temporal/locative).
Attributive adjective (masc.sg) modifying 'match'; expresses temporal sequence.
Common noun (masc.sg); object of the preposition 'au' within the PP.

translations.en: We want to avenge our cat.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们想为我们的猫报仇。
translations.yue: 我哋想為我哋隻貓報仇。
translations.ru: Мы хотим отомстить за нашего кота.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים לנקום בשביל החתול שלנו.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn trả thù cho con mèo của mình.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо помститися за нашого кота.
translations.hi: हम अपनी बिल्ली का बदला लेना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να εκδικηθούμε για τη γάτα μας.
translations.id: Kami ingin membalaskan dendam kucing kami.
translations.sv: Vi vill hämnas för vår katt.
translations.ja: うちの猫の仇を討ちたい。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun (3sg form, often meaning 'we'); subject of 'veut'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3sg; modal selecting an infinitival complement ('venger').
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'veut'; transitive, taking 'notre chat' as direct object.
Possessive determiner (1pl, invariable for gender, singular here); modifies 'chat'.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive 'venger'.

sentences.target: Tu venges ta sœur au tournoi.

translations.fr: Tu venges ta sœur au tournoi.
translations.en: You’ll avenge your sister at the tournament.
translations.es: Vengarás a tu hermana en el torneo.
translations.de: Du wirst deine Schwester beim Turnier rächen.
translations.ko: 넌 대회에서 네 자매를 위해 복수할 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 你会在锦标赛上为你妹妹报仇。
translations.yue: 你會喺錦標賽為你阿妹報仇。
translations.ru: Ты отомстишь за свою сестру на турнире.
translations.pt: Você vai vingar sua irmã no torneio.
translations.vi: Bạn sẽ trả thù cho em gái của mình ở giải đấu.
translations.nl: Je zult je zus wreken op het toernooi.
translations.uk: Ти помстишся за свою сестру на турнірі.
translations.hi: तुम अपनी बहन का बदला टूर्नामेंट में लोगे.
translations.el: Θα εκδικηθείς την αδελφή σου στο τουρνουά.
translations.nb: Du skal hevne søsteren din i turneringen.
translations.id: Kamu akan membalaskan dendam saudarimu di turnamen.
translations.sv: Du kommer att hämnas för din syster i turneringen.
translations.ro: Îți vei răzbuna sora la turneu.
translations.da: Du vil hævne din søster i turneringen.
translations.ja: 君は大会で妹の仇を討つ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'venges'.
Finite verb, present indicative 2sg; transitive predicate selecting 'ta sœur' as direct object and allowing a locative PP.
Possessive determiner (2sg, feminine singular agreement) modifying 'sœur'.
Common noun (fem.sg); direct object of 'venges'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; introduces the locative PP headed by 'tournoi'.
Common noun (masc.sg); object of the preposition 'au' in the PP.

sentences.target: Ils vont se venger du gardien.

translations.fr: Ils vont se venger du gardien.
translations.en: They’re going to get revenge on the goalie.
translations.de: Sie werden sich am Torwart rächen.
translations.pt: Eles vão se vingar do goleiro.
translations.vi: Họ sẽ trả thù thủ môn.
translations.nl: Ze gaan wraak nemen op de keeper.
translations.hi: वे गोलकीपर से बदला लेने वाले हैं.
translations.nb: De skal hevne seg på keeperen.
translations.id: Mereka akan membalas dendam pada penjaga gawang.
translations.da: De vil hævne sig på målmanden.
translations.ja: 彼らはゴールキーパーに復讐するつもりだ。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person plural subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'vont'.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative 3pl; forms periphrastic near future with the infinitive 'venger'.
Reflexive clitic pronoun (3rd person); part of the pronominal construction 'se venger', coreferential with the subject.
Infinitive verb headed by the auxiliary 'vont'; in pronominal use 'se venger de N' takes a prepositional complement with 'de'.
Contraction of preposition 'de' and article 'le'; introduces the complement required by 'se venger de'.
Common noun (masc.sg); object of the preposition 'du'.

Tu venges ta sœur au tournoi.
Ils vont se venger du gardien.
fr: Je te venge au prochain match.
Tu venges ta sœur au tournoi.
Ils vont se venger du gardien.
en: I’ll avenge you in the next game.
We want to avenge our cat.
You’ll avenge your sister at the tournament.
They’re going to get revenge on the goalie.
